page.title: Divorce Party Yacht Marbella: Celebrate the New Chapter

data.meta_description: Host an unforgettable divorce party yacht Marbella charter from Puerto Banús. Prices from €749/2h include skipper, drinks & snacks. Book your fresh start.
data.summary: Celebrate your new chapter with a divorce party yacht Marbella charter. Our fleet departs Puerto Banús with inclusive pricing, skipper, drinks, and snacks.
key_facts: Charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella’s luxury marina.
Prices from €749/2h (Tier A: Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) include skipper, drinks, snacks & VAT.
Tier B: Mangusta 80 (24m) from €4,719/4h includes a free jet ski.
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and safety equipment.
Fleet ranges from 6.4m speedboats (5 pax) to 29m Ferretti 94 (12 pax).
Customise with catering, DJ, or decorations – pricing on request via WhatsApp.
Marbella’s coast offers calm coves like Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés for anchoring.

faq.q: What is included in a divorce party yacht Marbella charter?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). Just bring your party – we handle the rest.

faq.q: How much does a divorce party yacht in Marbella cost?
faq.a: Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours and go up to €2,299 for 8 hours. Tier B (Mangusta 80) is €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours and includes a free jet ski. Other yachts are priced on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Which yachts are best for a divorce party in Marbella?
faq.a: For a small group of up to 11, the Azimut 39 or Astondoa 40 are ideal. For larger parties (up to 12), the Mangusta 80 (24m) or Azimut 58 Flybridge offer ample deck space. All depart from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: Can I bring my own decorations or a DJ for my divorce party?
faq.a: Yes, you can personalise your charter with decorations, a DJ, or custom catering. Just let us know your requirements via WhatsApp – we’ll arrange everything at an additional cost.

faq.q: Where does the yacht depart from for a divorce party in Marbella?
faq.a: All our yachts depart from Puerto Banús, the iconic luxury marina in Marbella. It’s easy to reach and offers ample parking. We’ll meet you at the boat.

faq.q: What is the maximum number of guests for a divorce party yacht?
faq.a: Our fleet accommodates from 5 guests (Dubhe or Mariah SX21) up to 12 guests on larger yachts like the Mangusta 80, Azimut 58, or Ferretti 94. Check the specific boat capacity when booking.

faq.q: Can I take the yacht to Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés?
faq.a: Absolutely. Our skippers know the best spots along the Costa del Sol, including Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and the coast toward Estepona. Anchoring is included in your charter time.

faq.q: How do I book a divorce party yacht in Marbella?
faq.a: Booking is simple – contact us via WhatsApp on our website. We’ll confirm availability, help you choose the right yacht, and send you all the details. A deposit secures your date.

data.body_html:
Ready to toast your independence? A divorce party yacht Marbella charter is the ultimate way to mark a fresh start. With the Mediterranean as your backdrop, you and your guests can celebrate in style – no exes, no drama, just sun, sea, and champagne. Our fleet departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella’s most glamorous marina, and every charter includes a skipper, drinks, snacks, and fuel. Prices start from €749 for two hours, so you can focus on the fun.

Why Choose a Divorce Party Yacht in Marbella?

Marbella offers 320 days of sunshine a year, calm waters, and a coastline dotted with exclusive coves. A private yacht charter gives you total freedom – anchor at Cala del Faro, cruise past the Golden Mile, or drop anchor off Cabopino. Unlike a crowded bar or restaurant, your yacht is a private space where you can laugh, cry, and dance without judgment. Plus, the skipper handles everything: navigation, mooring, and safety. You just bring your party mood.

Our Fleet for Your Divorce Party

We have boats for every group size and budget. All depart from Puerto Banús. Here’s a quick overview:

BoatLengthMax GuestsPrice fromNotes
Astondoa 4012.5m9€749/2hTier A – great value
Azimut 3912.5m11€749/2hTier A – spacious cockpit
Mangusta 80 (Grey/White)24m12€4,719/4hTier B – includes jet ski
Azimut 58 Flybridge17.6m12On requestFlybridge with sun pads
Ferretti 9429m12On requestLuxury flagship

For smaller groups (5–8 guests), consider the Dubhe (8m) or Mariah SX21. All prices include skipper, drinks, snacks, and VAT.

What’s Included in Every Charter

No hidden extras. Every booking includes:

  • Licensed, English-speaking skipper
  • Fuel for the full charter duration
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava
  • Light snacks (chips, olives, nuts)
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21% tax)

You can add catering, a DJ, or decorations – just ask via WhatsApp when booking.

Best Itineraries for a Divorce Party

Your skipper will suggest a route based on weather and your preferences. Popular options include:

  • Puerto Banús to Cala del Faro – 20 minutes east, a quiet cove with turquoise water. Anchor, swim, and toast your freedom.
  • Marbella Marina to Cabopino – 30 minutes west, past the Golden Mile. Cabopino has a sandy beach and chiringuito if you want to go ashore.
  • Estepona coast – 45 minutes southwest. More secluded coves and views of the Sierra Bermeja mountains.

All itineraries include time for swimming, sunbathing, and celebrating. The boat is yours for the duration.

How to Personalise Your Divorce Party Yacht

Make it truly yours. Popular add-ons include:

  • Private chef or catered menu (from €50/person)
  • DJ or Bluetooth speaker system
  • Balloons, banners, or custom decorations
  • Photographer or videographer
  • Jet ski (included free on Mangusta 80 charters)

Contact us via WhatsApp with your ideas – we’ll quote and arrange everything.

Booking Your Divorce Party Yacht in Marbella

Booking is straightforward. Visit our homepage and click the WhatsApp button. Tell us your preferred date, group size, and budget. We’ll confirm availability and send a booking link. A 50% deposit secures the date; the balance is due 48 hours before departure. We accept credit cards, bank transfer, or PayPal.

All charters depart from Puerto Banús. We’ll meet you at the dock 15 minutes before departure. The skipper will give a safety briefing, then it’s time to celebrate.

Frequently asked questions

What is included in a divorce party yacht Marbella charter?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). Just bring your party – we handle the rest.

How much does a divorce party yacht in Marbella cost?

Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours and go up to €2,299 for 8 hours. Tier B (Mangusta 80) is €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours and includes a free jet ski. Other yachts are priced on request via WhatsApp.

Which yachts are best for a divorce party in Marbella?

For a small group of up to 11, the Azimut 39 or Astondoa 40 are ideal. For larger parties (up to 12), the Mangusta 80 (24m) or Azimut 58 Flybridge offer ample deck space. All depart from Puerto Banús.

Can I bring my own decorations or a DJ for my divorce party?

Yes, you can personalise your charter with decorations, a DJ, or custom catering. Just let us know your requirements via WhatsApp – we’ll arrange everything at an additional cost.

Where does the yacht depart from for a divorce party in Marbella?

All our yachts depart from Puerto Banús, the iconic luxury marina in Marbella. It’s easy to reach and offers ample parking. We’ll meet you at the boat.

What is the maximum number of guests for a divorce party yacht?

Our fleet accommodates from 5 guests (Dubhe or Mariah SX21) up to 12 guests on larger yachts like the Mangusta 80, Azimut 58, or Ferretti 94. Check the specific boat capacity when booking.

Can I take the yacht to Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés?

Absolutely. Our skippers know the best spots along the Costa del Sol, including Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and the coast toward Estepona. Anchoring is included in your charter time.

How do I book a divorce party yacht in Marbella?

Booking is simple – contact us via WhatsApp on our website. We’ll confirm availability, help you choose the right yacht, and send you all the details. A deposit secures your date.
